additional information: I'm excited about this opportunity at Figma because it sits at the intersection of data infrastructure, ML systems, and product impact — areas I'm deeply passionate about. At Vanguard, I've designed AI-powered backend services integrating Python-based LLM APIs for intelligent text processing and automated workflows, and built event-driven data pipelines using DynamoDB Streams, Lambda, and SNS/SQS achieving 99.99% reliability. At Xebia, I built scalable microservices, automated infrastructure with Terraform on AWS and GCP, and implemented Kafka-based event-driven architectures that reduced inter-service failures by 35%. The prospect of shaping Figma's ML and data platform — from feature pipelines and model serving to prompt-processing systems and self-serve analytics — aligns directly with the work I find most energizing. I hold an MS in Computer Science from UNC Charlotte, am currently on F-1 OPT, and am open to working remotely or relocating for the right opportunity. I'd love to bring my full-stack and data engineering background to help Figma make AI a first-class part of its product experience.
